rows.source_ref: Simple Daily Trend Reversal Trading System, ForexFactory thread 713593, opened by user 'mrdfx' (2018), https://www.forexfactory.com/thread/713593-simple-daily-trend-reversal-trading-system (Part II: thread 864690)
rows.concept: Trend-reversal entry taken only when a (repainting) ZigZag arrow, an MBFX/Turbo-JSRX stochastic overbought-or-oversold reading, a custom trend indicator, and a candle closing back across a 10/15-period MA at a Fibonacci pivot zone all agree.
rows.eligibility_reason: Primary trigger (ZigZag arrow) repaints by author's own admission; confirming indicators (MBFX Timing / Turbo JSRX / unnamed 'trend indicator') are custom with parameters never disclosed; exits are wholly discretionary; cannot be faithfully mechanized and the thread's own EA was pulled for poor results.
rows.notes: Mainly H4 (also H1/D1), FX majors + GOLD. Exit is discretionary (fixed 50-100 pips / Fib / %ADR / opposite signal / trailing, plus manual 'monitor price action'). Variant by user 'ebeckers' adds a S/R-level filter and a channel-surfer filter and a H1-confirms-H4 multi-TF rule. Page 3: the mechanized SDTR EA was 'discontinued temporarily. Due to the poor results... removed.' Mechanizable skeleton (stochastic exit-of-OB/OS + trend filter + MA close-cross near Fib pivot) is generic and overlaps yet-another swing/reversal-MR variant; would require inventing all indicator definitions and a mechanical exit.
